summary: Verified email sending flow bug fix and CTR analytics on My Activity dashboard. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend flow verified via Playwright - inbox navigation passes contact_email in URL params, mode switch to Email works correctly without prompting for email when contact has email, and CTR analytics display properly on My Account page.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed when called from my-account.tsx refreshUserData function (console log visible)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Forest Ward conversation (ID: 69a15f29957bacd218fed55d)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email flow bug fix verified working. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/messages/conversations/{user_id} returns email in contact object (forestward@gmail.com). 2) POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} with channel=email returns resend_id confirming email sent. 3) Inbox navigation passes contact_email in URL params. 4) Mode switch to Email works without prompt when contact has email. 5) CTR analytics on My Activity shows Digital Cards (0% CTR), Review Links (100% CTR), Congrats Cards (0% CTR) with breakdown by SMS/Email channel. Twilio SMS is MOCKED. Resend Email is LIVE.
